diagrams.title: Memory Layout Diagram
diagrams.description: Complete memory layout showing all segments from low to high addresses
diagrams.purpose: Understand the organization of program memory segments and their relative positions in virtual address space

diagrams.title: Stack Frame Structure
diagrams.description: Structure of a stack frame (activation record) during function call
diagrams.purpose: Visualize what information is stored on the stack during function calls and how function execution context is maintained

diagrams.title: Heap and Stack Growth
diagrams.description: Shows how Heap grows upward and Stack grows downward toward each other
elements: Heap (starts above BSS, arrow pointing up)
diagrams.purpose: Understand the dynamic nature of Heap and Stack allocation and the concept of potential stack-heap collision

diagrams.title: Variable Storage Classification
diagrams.description: Classification chart showing where different types of variables are stored
diagrams.purpose: Remember which memory segment each storage class uses in C programming

visuals.title: Memory Layout Of A C Program
visuals.description: Visual diagram for memory layout of a c program
